U

UNAUTHORIZED - Enum constant in enum class entities.Response.ResponseStatus
 
UPDATE - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Update an existing record.
UPDATE_CHECKOUT - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Update the checkout status (customer leaving).
UPDATE_OPENING_HOURS - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Update the restaurant's business opening hours.
UPDATE_ORDER_STATUS - Enum constant in enum class entities.ActionType
Update the status of an order (e.g., from APPROVED to SEATED).
updateCustomerDetails(Customer) - Method in class DAO.CustomerDAO
Updates an existing customer's contact details based on their subscriber code.
updateEmployeeDetails(Employee) - Method in class DAO.EmployeeDAO
Updates an existing employee's details (password, phone, email).
updateFilter() - Method in class clientGui.reservation.OrderUi_controller
Updates the table filter based on selected date and status.
updateOrder(Order) - Method in class clientLogic.OrderLogic
Updates an existing order.
updateOrder(Order) - Method in class DAO.OrderDAO
Updates all fields of an existing order.

Controller for the "Update Order" window.

updateOrderCheckOut(int, double, Order.OrderStatus) - Method in class DAO.OrderDAO
Updates order status to PAID and sets leaving time.
updateOrderCheckOut(Order) - Method in class clientLogic.OrderLogic
Updates the checkout time/status of an order.
updateOrderSeating(int, int, Order.OrderStatus) - Method in class DAO.OrderDAO
Updates order status to SEATED, assigns a table, and sets arrival time.
updateOrderStatus(int, Order.OrderStatus) - Method in class DAO.OrderDAO
Updates the status of a specific order.
updateOrderStatusByConformationCode(int, Order.OrderStatus) - Method in class DAO.OrderDAO
Updates order status based on confirmation code.
updatePassword(Employee) - Method in class clientLogic.EmployeeLogic
Sends a request to update an employee's password.

Controller for the Update Profile screen.

Updates the schedule (Opening Hours) for a selected date.
updateSubscriber(Customer) - Method in class clientLogic.UserLogic
Updates existing subscriber details.
updateTable(Table) - Method in class clientLogic.TableLogic
Updates an existing table.
updateTable(Table) - Method in class DAO.TableDAO
Updates the number of seats for a specific table.
updateTable(List<?>) - Method in class clientGui.user.SubscriberHistoryController
 
updateTableStatus(int, int) - Method in class DAO.TableDAO
Updates the physical occupancy status of a table.
updateTickerFromList(List<OpeningHours>) - Method in class clientGui.managerTeam.ManagerOptionsController
 
updateTimeButtons(List<TimeSlotStatus>) - Method in class clientGui.reservation.ReservationController
Updates the time slot buttons based on availability data from the server.
